calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-03-2024 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-23-2022 Set For Trial On Jan-29-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2022 Continued To Dec-07-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-19-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT TAM TRAN'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is denied.

First, plaintiff's Unfair Competition Law allegations are adequate for the pleading stage - they "apprise defendant[] of the basis of the cause of action." (See People v. Sup. Ct. (1973) 9 Cal.3d 283, 288.) The number of violations is "the subject of discovery." (Id.)
Second, the other language defendant seeks to strike is relevant for background. The "use of the motion to strike should be cautious and sparing," not "a procedural 'line item veto' for the civil defendant." (PH II, Inc. v. Sup. Ct. (1995) 33 Cal.App.4th 1680, 1683.)

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)
